title: <div>The first time a male fucked m(al)e was when my ex-girlfriend visited home,
content:
The first time a male fucked m(al)e was when my ex-girlfriend visited home, the false south, and made pizzas over Christmas. There were three guys that night. And a few days before, my ex girlfriend and I drove up a few hours north to visit her grandma who survived what I thought would be deaf.

The second time I sucked a guy, was after my ex girlfriend and I moved to Texas and recovered all of our materials left over from a moving accident from a dumpster. After returning from there for our adventure, I stayed up all night did cocaine, and fuck someone in my girlfriends car, again.

The third time I fucked a guy I was single.

It sucks.
